title: Island Living|Stunning Sea View |Upgraded Interior
raw_area: Bluewaters Residences Building 2, Bluewaters Residences, Bluewaters, Dubai
description:
Discover refined island living in this exceptional 2-bedroom residence at Bluewaters Residences 2. The apartment offers breathtaking panoramic views of the Arabian Gulf through expansive floor-to-ceiling windows that flood the interiors with natural light. The layout is thoughtfully designed with upgraded modern finishes, an open kitchen flowing seamlessly into spacious living and dining areas, and a large balcony ideal for outdoor dining and sunset relaxation. Built-in wardrobes provide ample storage, while the apartment also includes a maid’s room with en-suite bathroom and a separate utility/storage room for added functionality.

Bluewaters Residences is an exclusive island community offering resort-style living. Residents enjoy access to a swimming pool, fully equipped gym, landscaped gardens, basketball courts, walking paths, and dedicated children’s play areas. The island also features a curated retail and dining scene, including Gordon Ramsay’s Hell’s Kitchen and Caesars Palace Resort, creating a vibrant yet private lifestyle environment.

Located off the coast of JBR, Bluewaters Island is connected to Sheikh Zayed Road via a dedicated bridge and offers seamless mobility through electric buggies and water taxis. Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, and Downtown Dubai are all within convenient reach, making this address a rare combination of privacy, prestige, and accessibility.

title: Spacious Corner Unit | High Floor | Park View
raw_area: Castleton, Central Park at City Walk, City Walk, Dubai
description:
This spacious 4-bedroom apartment on a high floor in Castleton at Central Park offers a rare blend of calm greenery and modern city living. Set in the heart of Dubai, the community feels like a private urban oasis, wrapped in lush park landscapes and quiet walking paths, yet only minutes from the city’s main attractions.

The interior is decorated in soft neutral tones, natural materials, and clean lines, creating a calm, modern atmosphere. Floor-to-ceiling windows in elegant black frames let in sunlight throughout the day and offer stunning views. Two private balconies, a maid's room, and walk-in closets create a space ideal for living.

Castleton is built around the idea of living next to nature without leaving the city. Residents enjoy exclusive access to a private gated park filled with landscaped gardens, water features, picnic lawns, running tracks, dog parks, and play areas for children of all ages. For an active lifestyle, there are tennis and squash courts, a half-basketball court, multi-sports lawns, an outdoor gym, skateable zones, yoga and meditation areas, and swimming pools surrounded by greenery.

The wider community adds even more convenience with dining outlets, retail stores, a nursery, event spaces, BBQ pavilions, and quiet corners for relaxation.

With handover scheduled for 2026, this home is an ideal opportunity to secure a peaceful yet central residence with Downtown views in one of Dubai’s most desirable park-front developments.

title: Chic High-Floor Apartment in Dubai Marina
description:
Occupying a high floor of Botanica Tower in Dubai Marina, this fully upgraded five-bedroom apartment spans 4,543 sq.ft. and enjoys panoramic views of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai Harbour. Fully furnished and move-in ready, the apartment combines expansive interiors with a vast terrace that extends from the living areas, office and principal suite, creating an exceptional indoor-outdoor relationship.

Natural light fills the home through large windows that frame the waterfront outlook, while the upgraded interiors showcase urban sensibilities with carefully selected furnishings throughout. The spacious living and dining area forms the heart of the residence, offering ample room for both entertaining and everyday family life.

The open kitchen is fitted with built-in appliances and is seamlessly integrated into the main living spaces. The bedrooms feature en-suite bathrooms and built-in wardrobes, while the principal suite benefits from a walk-in closet, generous proportions and direct terrace access. Well-appointed bathrooms and thoughtful planning ensure comfort across the home.

Practical additions include a dedicated office, maid’s room, laundry room, separate storage area, and a dedicated parking space.

Located in one of Dubai Marina’s most sought-after waterfront towers, residents enjoy easy access to the area's restaurants, cafés, retail destinations and marina promenade.

Dubai Marina places residents moments from The Walk at JBR, Dubai Marina Mall and Bluewaters Island, while Palm Jumeirah and Emirates Golf Club are within 15 minutes. Mall of the Emirates, Burj Al Arab and Downtown Dubai can be reached in 20–25 minutes, with Sheikh Zayed Road providing easy connectivity across the city.

Reach out to us today to arrange a private viewing of this beautiful apartment.

title: 2 Bed | Dual Aspect | Partial Upgrade
description:
Positioned within one of Al Barari’s most sought-after addresses, this beautifully presented two-bedroom residence in Seventh Heaven offers a rare blend of space, light, and dual-aspect living.

Spanning an impressive 2,662 sq.ft, the apartment has been thoughtfully maintained and selectively upgraded, creating a turnkey home that balances contemporary design with everyday functionality. The expansive open-plan living and dining area is framed by floor-to-ceiling glazing, drawing in natural light throughout the day and seamlessly connecting to two private balconies - each offering a distinct outlook and the choice between tranquil northern or sun-soaked southern exposure.

The kitchen is sleek and refined, complete with a central island and high-quality integrated appliances, flowing effortlessly into the main living space - ideal for both entertaining and relaxed daily living.

Both bedrooms are generously proportioned, with upgraded flooring adding warmth and sophistication. The secondary bedroom enjoys open views towards the Downtown skyline, while the principal suite offers a more private retreat with ample storage and a well-appointed en-suite. Additional enhancements include bespoke built-in TV walls and a refined entrance hallway, elevating the overall finish of the home.

A standout feature rarely found in similar layouts is the large dedicated laundry and storage room, providing exceptional practicality without compromising on living space.

Set within the greenery of Al Barari, Seventh Heaven remains one of Dubai’s most architecturally distinct developments, offering residents a unique lifestyle surrounded by nature, yet within close proximity to the city.

This is an ideal opportunity for both end-users and investors seeking a spacious, well-upgraded apartment in one of Dubai’s most prestigious communities.

Discovery Gardens is a perfect community for singles and families looking for an affordable, green, and pedestrian-friendly neighborhood in Dubai.
Situated close to Ibn Battuta Mall, the area provides a self-sufficient lifestyle with convenient access to supermarkets, petrol stations, restaurants, and laundry facilities.
Developed by Nakheel in 2009, Discovery Gardens is known for its lively low-rise apartment buildings and extensive green spaces, ideal for walking and outdoor activities.
Residents can also take advantage of community swimming pools and tennis courts. The neighborhood mainly attracts mid-income South Asian families and corporate professionals.
Nestled in vibrant Jebel Ali, Discovery Gardens offers seamless connectivity via Sheikh Zayed Road and E311, plus its own metro station. You’re just minutes from:
-Ibn Battuta Mall (5 min)
-Dubai Marina (10 min)
-Downtown Dubai (25 min)

description:
This spectacular four bedroom apartment is positioned within the highly prestigious Orla by Omniyat — managed by Dorchester Collection — on the Palm’s Crescent.

Crafted by Foster + Partners with a vision to establish a strong and seamless connection between the indoors and outdoors, it spans 8,010 sq.ft. and presents exceptionally tasteful interiors.

The living area comes as the apartment’s social and entertainment core. Double-height ceilings enhance the sense of scale and light, with the full-height glazing framing framing views of the Palm and the Arabian sea. Just outside, a vast balcony offers the perfect al fresco space with unbeatable vistas and the comfort of a private swimming pool.

Sleek and well-appointed with top-tier European appliances, the show kitchen is supported by a closed preparation kitchen — making for an elaborate culinary setup. Each bedroom is ensuite, and served by generous balconies.

The home also benefits from a maid’s room, an office, and four parking spaces, alongside Orla’s world-class facilities. Stationed minutes from Atlantis the Palm and Atlantis The Royal, its setting places prime lifestyle, entertainment and dining destinations at the doorstep.

Palm Jumeirah stands as an iconic address worldwide. Well connected to Dubai’s key thoroughfares, it places coveted destinations including The View at The Palm, Palm West Beach, Club Vista Mare, and Palm Jumeirah Mall at a convenient distance.
